log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Kalashtar — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20(ADV):20+6=26 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Archmage's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Cone of Cold (Level 5 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 CON save. 60ft cone.
→ Kalashtar — Bardic Musician: SUCCESS. 20 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Kalashtar — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:3+6=9 vs DC 16] FAIL!
Archmage is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Archmage WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:5+6=11 vs DC 16] FAIL — still paralyzed.
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Kalashtar — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:17+6=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
Archmage is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Archmage WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:14+6=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
